arxiv_requirements_snapshot.submission_root_rule: arXiv compiles from the root of the submitted directory even when the top-level TeX file is in a subdirectory.

recommended_pipeline.purpose: Build the generated LaTeX source before packaging.
recommended_pipeline.notes: Local build used TeX Live 2026/Homebrew, so arXiv TeX Live 2025 parity remains a bounded external check.

recommended_pipeline.purpose: Flatten the Pandoc-generated TeX source before sanitizer handoff.
recommended_pipeline.notes: Applied locally because it creates a single-file source package for a simple manuscript.

recommended_pipeline.purpose: Create the default cleaned arXiv upload directory.
recommended_pipeline.notes: Ran through uvx. The cleaner warned about preserving conditionals, and the cleaned source still rebuilt.

recommended_pipeline.purpose: Inspect generated source and PDF metadata for obvious local paths, secrets, JavaScript, encryption, and PDF metadata issues.
recommended_pipeline.notes: A stronger gitleaks or trufflehog pass remains recommended before public upload.

tool_checks.expected_output: Standalone LaTeX source generated from the manuscript Markdown.
A flattened TeX source for sanitizer handoff.
A seven-page PDF built from the expanded TeX source.
A cleaned arXiv source directory that rebuilds locally.
A stricter cleaned source package if the optional tool is installed and preserves the PDF.
No secrets or credentials in the cleaned upload package.

tool_checks.command: rg -n "AKIA|SECRET|PASSWORD|TOKEN|BEGIN RSA|PRIVATE KEY|/Users/doughnut|/Volumes/PortableSSD" build/submission docs/26-journal-target-requirements.md docs/27-submission-manuscript.md docs/28-submission-supplement.md examples/arxiv-readiness.manuscript-planned.json && pdfinfo build/submission/foi-o-nz-submission-manuscript.pdf
tool_checks.expected_output: No committed source hits for secrets or local paths; PDF metadata reports no JavaScript, no encryption, and seven pages.

package_checks.reviewer_notes: The arxiv-latex-cleaner output rebuilt locally with latexmk and XeLaTeX.
The cleaned source package uses a single root-level main.tex file.
Basic ripgrep checks were clean except generated LaTeX build metadata; a dedicated secret scanner remains recommended before public upload.
Local compilation used TeX Live 2026/Homebrew, while arXiv currently defaults to TeX Live 2025.

human_gates: Confirm arXiv category and subject classification.
Confirm author list, affiliations, funding, conflicts, and submission authority.
Approve final arXiv upload after local package validation.
Run a dedicated secret scanner if available before public source upload.
